title: Attach request fields to log events
scenario: Useful logs carry fields such as request_id and attempt count so operators can filter and correlate events.
instructions: Add LogFields and include fields on LogEvent.

hints.body: Keep the Structured request logging code active and add LogFields and include fields on LogEvent.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Attach request fields to log events is shown below.

completionExplanation: Attach request fields to log events now extends the active Structured request logging code with log event fields. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
